name: Italiani's Country Rigatoni
recipeIngredient: Pulled cooked chicken (1/4 lb, sliced into 2-inch pieces)
Cooked Italian sausage (1/4 lb, sliced into 1/4-inch rounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the bean broth: Place the beans and their liquid, oregano, onion, and chicken broth in a saucepot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a slow simmer. Cook for 1 hour.
2. Assemble the dish: Heat olive oil over medium heat in a large skillet. Add garlic and oregano, stirring until lightly browned. Add tomatoes, broccoli, chicken, and sausage. Stir to heat all ingredients thoroughly and mix well.
3. Pour in the prepared bean broth and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the liquid is reduced by one-quarter.
4. Add escarole and butter, a tablespoon at a time. If pasta has been precooked, place it in a hot water bath and reheat without overcooking.
5. Just before serving, toss the drained pasta with the sauce and Parmesan. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
Nutritional information per serving: 1.044 calories; 46g protein, 111g carbohydrates, 44g fat (38%), 7.6g fiber, 109mg cholesterol, 1,682mg sodium
Source: Italiani's Restaurant, Kendall, Miami, FL
Cook's Corner, Miami Herald, 1/4/96, formatted by Lisa Crawford
